text.title: Quality-Attribute Trade-off Analysis Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-trade-off-quality-attributes.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: report_id pattern violation; <2 attributes; <2 conflicts; empty sensitivity_points; review_trigger empty; version + date malformed.
